MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Alicia K. Berry, of Office of the Attorney General, Tel. 415.703.5391, for petitioners;
Cynthia Edwards, in pro per, Tel. 415.474.1182, for respondents.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Approval Of Assurance Of Voluntary Compliance is granted. Order signed in open court.
